notes: Japanese national standards developer and publisher. Operates webdesk.jsa.or.jp as the standards sales portal. Most JIS standards relevant to information security (JIS Q-series) are Japanese editions of ISO/IEC originals — e.g., JIS Q 27001 = ISO/IEC 27001. Standards are paywalled at JSA. Not redistributable. The Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC) is the broader policy body; JSA is the publisher.

match_nodes.description: JIS Q-series — Japanese editions of ISO/IEC management-system standards

data.notes: JIS Q-series standards are Japanese national editions of ISO/IEC management-system standards. Technical content tracks the ISO master; cross-reference secid:control/iso.org/<n>. Paywalled at JSA.

examples.note: JIS Q 27001 — Japanese edition of ISO/IEC 27001.
JIS Q 15001 — Personal Information Protection Management Systems (Japanese-original).
